generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a senior citizen who values both security and freedom, I've been concerned about how our current defense policies are putting too much burden on our allies while weakening our own preparedness. Did you know that recent studies show 68% of defense experts believe we're over-relying on foreign partners for critical security needs? It's time we invest in our own strategic autonomy to protect our civil liberties and ensure we're not caught off guard. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
